narrative.narrative: ETF inflows and low volatility (VIX) are fueling complacency, mirroring August 2024's market calm before a slight correction. Historically, this setup has favored a risk-on stance but warrants caution.
narrative.headline: Complacent Markets: Calm Before the Storm?
